[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110111011 7
1 0111011101 7
2 0110010110 5
3 0111010110 6
4 1010100000 3
5 1101110100 6
6 1010111010 6
7 1011101011 7

01 10 0111001110 6
12 21 0001010001 3
23 32 1101010000 4
34 43 0001100110 4
45 54 0001001011 4
56 65 0001000000 1
67 76 1101110110 7
70 07 0111010100 5

02 20 0110011111 7
13 31 1100000001 3
24 42 1100110110 6
35 53 0000101101 4
46 64 0000001011 3
57 75 1100110110 6
60 06 1010100010 4
71 17 0000011010 3

14 41 1101100111 7

36 63 0001101101 5
47 74 1101111101 8
50 05 1011100010 5
61 16 1101101100 6
72 27 0001001011 4

15 51 1100101100 5
26 62 1100111101 7
37 73 1100011011 6
